description: Documentation dependency registry. Hand-editable source of truth. Read by pre-write-guard.sh and librarian session-close. Mirrored into Logs/librarian-manifest.json -> doc_dependencies on each /librarian full run. Cascade registry consumed by pre-write-guard.sh + librarian session-close + entity-parity capability.

_path_placeholders._description: Path placeholders are substituted at install time. Foundation-repo ships paths in this parameterized form; install.sh resolves each placeholder against the adopter's environment.
_path_placeholders.{vault_root}: Adopter's vault root (per onboarding wizard archetype)

schema_notes.rename_history: Append-only audit trail of renames that have touched an entry's primary / mirrors[]. Each row: {"from": "<old-path>", "to": "<new-path>", "at": "<ISO8601>", "commit": "<sha>"}. Populated by rename-detect.sh at librarian session-close. Forward-only: no historical backfill. Empty array means no known renames since instrumentation landed.

entries.rationale: Deny-list (block deliverables) rather than allow-list because scratch/operational concepts don't have first-class type values in vault-schema.json. type=log permitted explicitly; no-type scratch permitted implicitly. Soft-warn by default; may harden to deny once write-time enforcement is broadly trusted.

mirrors._deferred: Spoke not yet authored (pending S1.1); entry acceptable per SP13 Phase 3 scope.
Spoke not yet authored (pending S1.1); entry acceptable per SP13 Phase 3 scope.

entries.notes: System Governance.md is the hub with 6 narrative spokes under System Governance/ (one per governance pillar; canonical §D). When writing to the hub, verify stub redirects still point at live spoke files. When writing to a spoke, verify the hub stub exists. max_lines: 400 on hub, 200-250 on spokes.
CLAUDE.md carries an abridged directory tree. The canonical tree lives in System Governance - Structure.md. If top-level vault directories are added/removed, both must update.

entries._dissolution_reason: vault-schema.json dissolved in SP13 T-4 (2026-05-14); canonical successor for type registry is governance/frontmatter-rules.json#types; type consistency is now enforced via foundation-master.json bundle reads in pre-write-guard.sh + post-write-verify.sh (SP13 T-3 migration). Physical removal pending T-6 final consumer migration. Frozen body preserved below.
entries.notes: FROZEN: vault-schema.json dissolved (SP13 T-4). Hooks now read foundation-master.json bundle; this cascade entry is retired. R-37 lockstep for type additions now references governance/frontmatter-rules.json#types (add to pillar JSON + rebuild bundle + update hooks + spoke). Physical deletion at SP13 T-6.

entities._comment: Entity parity registry. Each entity declares a canonical source path template with {name} placeholder, an instance-enumerator (glob/file-list/directory-index), the canonical field to compare, and mirrors with strict/presence-only flags. Consumed by librarian capability entity-parity.sh.

mirrors.notes: Vault design spec for the skill. Present for most runtime skills; absent for a minority of backend-only skills.
Master catalog row. Description column is paraphrased-by-design (summary, not mirror). Presence-only check.
Master backlog row. Single-line pointer per sentinel pattern; summary text is paraphrased. Presence-only check.
Plan manifest. Optional because pre-manifest plans may not carry one; when present, top-level status must match spec frontmatter.
Backlog-progress satellite (sentinel pattern). Only exists for plans with session logs, hence optional.
MEMORY.md index entry. Summary after em-dash is paraphrased for scan-readability. Presence-only check.
